parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ command: 'docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -c "' + $json.sql.replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', clauses_loaded: $('Build Clause Library').first().json.clause_count, db_result: ($json.content || '').substring(0, 200) }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM gda_clause_library WHERE clause_number ILIKE $1 OR title ILIKE $2 ORDER BY clause_number LIMIT 50

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ command: 'docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -A -F"|" -c "' + $json.sql.replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'matched', plan_id: $('Match Clauses to Plan').first().json.plan_id, categories: $('Match Clauses to Plan').first().json.categories, clauses: ($json.content || '').split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}).map(function(l){var p=l.split('|');return {clause:p[0]||'',title:p[1]||'',category:p[2]||'',response:p[3]||''};}) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unknown action. Use: init, search, or match' }) }}
